## What does this PR change?

Briefly describe what was changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` New command or feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation update
- [ ] `chore:` Housekeeping
- [ ] `refactor:` Code restructure, no behaviour change

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on Windows 11
- [ ] All affected commands open the correct settings page
- [ ] Help screen displays correctly with no arguments
- [ ] Unrecognised command produces an error message and exits with code 1

## Related issue (if any)

Closes #
